subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God that have been sent down in remembrance of one of His handmaidens who hath ascended unto the Most Glorious Companion and entered therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله قد نزلت فی ذکر امه من امائه التی صعدت الی الرفیق الابهی و دخلت
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @eulogies; reminiscences, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @consolation and comfort
